stemHtml: With regards to atmospheric convergence on synoptic charts, which of the following is correct? The net flow of air is...

options.a: towards the area of convergence on the chart, along converging isobars marked on the chart.
options.b: away from the area of convergence, across the isobars marked on the chart.
options.c: towards the area of convergence, across the isobars marked on the chart.
options.d: away from the area of convergence, along diverging isobars marked on the chart.
